issue.summary: Secure International Data Remittance with Risk Scoring
issue.description:
As a registered banking customer, I want to send money internationally through a secure digital remittance platform, So that the beneficiary receives funds safely, quickly, and in compliance with regulatory requirements.
BUSINESS OBJECTIVE: Enable secure cross-border remittance with automated validation, compliance checks, fraud risk scoring, and real-time transaction tracking.
FUNCTIONAL REQUIREMENTS:
1. Sender Authentication - Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) required - Session validation before initiating transaction - Re-authentication if session expires
2. Beneficiary Data Capture - Beneficiary Full Name - Bank Name - SWIFT/BIC Code (8 or 11 characters) - IBAN or Account Number - Destination Country - Transfer Amount - Currency Type - Purpose of Remittance
System Validations: - SWIFT format validation - IBAN checksum validation - Currency-country compatibility - Amount threshold validation
3. Real-Time Validation Engine - Verify sender account balance - Apply real-time FX conversion rate - Calculate remittance charges - Display total debit amount
If balance is less than required amount, block transaction.
4. Compliance and Risk Scoring - Sanctions screening - PEP screening - AML pattern analysis - Velocity checks for multiple transfers
Each transaction must generate: - Risk Score between 0 and 100 - Risk Category: Low, Medium, or High
If risk score is less than 70, transaction proceeds automatically. If risk score is greater than 85, transaction moves to manual review.
5. Transaction Processing - Generate unique Transaction ID - Encrypt payload using AES-256 - Send to Payment Gateway API - Store audit log entry
Transaction Status Values: - INITIATED - PROCESSING - SUCCESS - FAILED - PENDING_REVIEW
6. Notifications - In-app confirmation - Email notification - Optional SMS alert
7. Audit Logging - User ID - IP Address - Timestamp - Risk Score - Compliance Decision Logs retained for 7 years.
NON-FUNCTIONAL REQUIREMENTS: - Response time under 3 seconds - 99.9 percent availability - Support 10,000 transactions per hour - Secure encrypted storage
issue.acceptance_criteria:
SCENARIO 1: Successful Remittance Given user is authenticated And beneficiary details are valid And sufficient balance exists And risk score is less than 70 When user confirms transaction Then system processes transfer And status becomes SUCCESS And user receives confirmation
SCENARIO 2: High Risk Transaction Given transaction amount exceeds threshold And beneficiary is flagged in sanctions list When transaction is submitted Then system assigns risk score greater than 85 And status becomes PENDING_REVIEW And compliance team is notified
SCENARIO 3: Invalid SWIFT Code Given user enters invalid SWIFT format When user clicks submit Then system displays validation error And transaction is not processed
SCENARIO 4: Insufficient Balance Given user balance is less than required debit amount When transaction is initiated Then system blocks transaction And displays insufficient balance message
